channel.title: Use Case Intel — Threat Intel Feed
channel.description: High-fidelity IOCs aggregated from The Hacker News, BleepingComputer, Microsoft Security Blog and CISA KEV. Refreshed daily. CVEs/hashes via regex; domains/IPs only when defanged by the source author.

item.title: [SHA256/CRIT] ab4fcadaec49c03278063dd269ea5eef82d24f2124a8e15d7b90f2fa8601266c
item.description:
SHA256: ab4fcadaec49c03278063dd269ea5eef82d24f2124a8e15d7b90f2fa8601266c

Severity: crit · First seen: 2026-05-12 · Sources: The Hacker News, StepSecurity, BleepingComputer, Aikido, GitHub Security Advisories, Snyk

Context: New Exim BDAT Vulnerability Exposes GnuTLS Builds to Potential Code Execution
